---
title: Near-field commercial aircraft contribution to nitrogen oxides by engine, aircraft type, and airline by individual
  plume sampling
date: '2008-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- K. Ropkins
- D. Laxen
- S. Moorcroft
- B. Marner
- M.L. Williams
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Environmental Science and Technology*'
---

## Near-field commercial aircraft contribution to nitrogen oxides by engine, aircraft type, and airline by individual plume sampling

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, K. Ropkins, D. Laxen, S. Moorcroft, B. Marner, M.L. Williams</p>

_*Environmental Science and Technology*_, 2008


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2008.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
